Package neqsim.process.safety.risk.fta

Class FaultTreeNode

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.risk.fta.FaultTreeNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class FaultTreeNode extends Object implements Serializable
Node in a fault tree — either a basic event (with a probability) or a gate (AND / OR / VOTING) with child nodes.

Build trees programmatically via static factory methods and pass the root to FaultTreeAnalyzer.topEventProbability(FaultTreeNode).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Field
    Description
    final double
    basicProbability
    Basic-event failure probability (only used if gate == null).
    double

    β-factor for common-cause-failure correction at OR gates (0 = independent).
    final List<FaultTreeNode>
    children
    Child nodes for non-leaf nodes.
    final FaultTreeAnalyzer.GateType
    gate
    Gate type or null for basic events.
    int
    kOfN
    k for k-of-n voting gates.

    name
    Node label (basic event ID for leaves; description for gates).

    serialVersionUID

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FaultTreeNode
    and(String name, FaultTreeNode... children)
    Create an AND gate (top fails only if all children fail).
    static FaultTreeNode
    basic(String name, double probability)
    Create a basic event leaf.
    boolean
    isBasic()
    Whether this node is a basic event (leaf).
    static FaultTreeNode
    or(String name, FaultTreeNode... children)
    Create an OR gate (top fails if any child fails).
    static FaultTreeNode
    voting(String name, int k, FaultTreeNode... children)
    Create a k-of-n voting gate.
    FaultTreeNode
    withCCF(double beta)
    Apply a β-factor common-cause failure correction to this gate (only valid for OR / VOTING).

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • name

      public final String name
      Node label (basic event ID for leaves; description for gates).

    • gate

      public final FaultTreeAnalyzer.GateType gate
      Gate type or null for basic events.

    • basicProbability

      public final double basicProbability
      Basic-event failure probability (only used if gate == null).

    • children

      public final List<FaultTreeNode> children
      Child nodes for non-leaf nodes.

    • kOfN

      public int kOfN
      k for k-of-n voting gates.

    • betaCCF

      public double betaCCF
      β-factor for common-cause-failure correction at OR gates (0 = independent).

  • Constructor Details

    • FaultTreeNode

      private FaultTreeNode(String name, FaultTreeAnalyzer.GateType gate, double basicProbability)

  • Method Details

    • basic

      public static FaultTreeNode basic(String name, double probability)
      Create a basic event leaf.
      Parameters:
      name - basic event name / ID
      probability - failure probability
      Returns:
      new basic-event node

    • and

      public static FaultTreeNode and(String name, FaultTreeNode... children)
      Create an AND gate (top fails only if all children fail).
      Parameters:
      name - gate description
      children - child nodes
      Returns:
      new AND-gate node

    • or

      public static FaultTreeNode or(String name, FaultTreeNode... children)
      Create an OR gate (top fails if any child fails).
      Parameters:
      name - gate description
      children - child nodes
      Returns:
      new OR-gate node

    • voting

      public static FaultTreeNode voting(String name, int k, FaultTreeNode... children)
      Create a k-of-n voting gate.
      Parameters:
      name - gate description
      k - number of failed inputs that triggers gate
      children - child nodes (n)
      Returns:
      new voting-gate node

    • withCCF

      public FaultTreeNode withCCF(double beta)
      Apply a β-factor common-cause failure correction to this gate (only valid for OR / VOTING).
      Parameters:
      beta - β factor in [0, 1]
      Returns:
      this node for chaining

    • isBasic

      public boolean isBasic()
      Whether this node is a basic event (leaf).
      Returns:
      true for basic events
